# Contributing Guide

Thank you for contributing to Loan Risk Analyzer.

## Setup

Install dependencies:

```bash
pnpm install
```

# Code of Conduct

Be respectful and professional.

## Expected Behavior

- Respect all contributors
- Provide constructive feedback
- Avoid harassment or abuse

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment
- Hate speech
- Personal attacks

This project follows open-source community standards.
